title: CB Local (Annual Operating Budget / Policy Reference)
description: This policy relates to the district's annual operating budget and financial planning processes, as well as the board's authorization of specific financial actions, such as submitting grant applications. It applies to the school district as a whole, guiding how school board members make and approve key financial decisions. For parents and community members, this matters because it reflects how the district manages and pursues funding that can directly impact programs, resources, and services available to students.

timeline_local.summary: This is not a policy change document. Rather, it is a board agenda item requesting approval of a resolution authorizing Conroe ISD to submit a grant application to the Office of the Governor for the 2026-2027 State and Local Cybersecurity Grant Program (Objective 3: Mitigation). The grant supports purchasing and implementing security protections commensurate with risk. Board approval of a resolution is required as part of the application process, and matching funds would be required if the grant is awarded. Board Policy CB Local is cited as the policy reference.
timeline_local.notes: This page is a board agenda recommendation/explanation memo, not a redline policy document. There are no policy text changes (no underlined or strikethrough text). The policy reference 'Board Policy CB Local' is cited only as authority for the action, not as a policy being amended. The action being taken is adoption of a resolution, not a policy revision.
